pi_items.source: Extracted from the gvSIG project file state.xml (countries_base.gvsproj) inside the gvsig_desktop_env/data/projects directory, which references the Natural Earth shapefile.
Calculated hex equivalent of the target color RGB (255, 0, 0) stated explicitly in the task description.
Explicitly specified in the task description: RGB (255, 0, 0).
Explicitly specified in the task description: RGB (255, 0, 0).
Explicitly specified in the task description: RGB (255, 0, 0).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the ne_110m_admin_0_countries layer, loaded from the public Natural Earth dataset into the countries_base.gvsproj gvSIG project. In the initial project state, the fill color of this layer is dark blue (RGB 0, 49, 95). The task description explicitly mandates changing this to bright red with exact RGB values (255, 0, 0) which is equivalent to hex code #FF0000. All metadata claims exactly match the data contents and task instructions.
